Items.Title: 浦那的 Python 培训 | Python Training in Pune
Items.Description:
艾拉杰恩

发表于 1 月 23 日

你想用 Python 练习数据结构吗？ 在本文中，我解释了有关在 Python 列表中获取项目索引的每个细节，Python 列表是 Python 程序中使用的一种基本数据结构。

列表是 Python 中的内置数据结构之一。 它表示为方括号中数据点的集合，可以存储不同数据类型的值。 浦那的 Python 培训

任何人都可以编写一些代码，然后供其他人下载、安装和使用。 您可能会发现这些程序称为 Python 模块或 Python 包。 但这两个术语有什么区别？ 我们将在本文中探讨这个问题。模块和包都使代码可以在许多人中重用。 您可以编写一个模块来计算各种形状的面积。 你可以把这个模块给你的朋友，这样他们就可以使用它而不必重写所有代码。 这样可以节省时间和精力，并有助于避免错误。
学习 Python 对我来说非常困难，但也不一定如此。

十多年前，我是一名大学毕业生，拥有历史学位，但前途渺茫。 然后，我成为一名成功的机器学习工程师、数据科学顾问，现在是 Dataquest 的首席执行官。不过，这不是一蹴而就的成功故事。 我的 Python 学习之旅漫长、低效，而且常常令人沮丧。如果可以重来，我会按照本文中要与您分享的步骤进行操作。 它会加快我的职业生涯，节省数千小时的浪费时间，并避免很多压力。
那里的许多课程使学习 Python 变得更加困难。 为了说明我的观点，我将举一个个人例子。

当我刚开始学习 Python 时，我想做一些让我兴奋的事情，比如制作网站。 不幸的是，我正在学习的课程迫使我在语法上花费数月的时间。 这是痛苦的。

在整个课程中，Python 代码仍然看起来很陌生且令人困惑。 这就像一种外星语言。 毫不奇怪，我很快就失去了兴趣。

遗憾的是，大多数 Python 教程都与此非常相似。 他们假定您需要先学习所有 Python 语法，然后才能开始做任何有趣的事情。 难怪大多数人都放弃了？

与其将时间浪费在这些平凡的任务上，不如体验 Python 带来的真正刺激。 想想分析数据、建立网站或创建具有人工智能的自主无人机！

原文:

ayra jain

Posted on Jan 23

Do you want to practice data structures in Python? In this article, I explain every detail about getting the index of an item in a Python list, a fundamental data structure used in Python programs.

The list is one of the built-in data structures in Python. It is represented as a collection of data points in square brackets and can store values with different data types. The Python list is a versatile and efficient data structure, so it is of great importance to know how to manipulate and interact for designing efficient Python programs.

Python Training in pune

python is an open-source language, meaning its existing and new developments are freely available to everyone. Anyone can write some code and then make it available for others to download, install, and use. You might find these programs referred to as Python modules or Python packages. But what is the difference between these two terms? We’ll explore this question in this article.Modules and packages both make code reusable among many people. You can write a module to calculate the area of various shapes. And you can give this module to your friends so they can use it without having to rewrite all the code. This saves time and effort and helps avoid mistakes.
Learning Python was extremely difficult for me, but it didn’t have to be.

A little over a decade ago, I was a college graduate with a history degree and few prospects. Then, I became a successful machine learning engineer, data science consultant, and now CEO of Dataquest.This is not an overnight success story, though. My journey to learn Python was long, inefficient, and frequently discouraging.If I could do it over again, I would follow the steps I’m going to share with you in this article. It would have fast-tracked my career, saved thousands of hours of wasted time, and prevented a lot of stress.
Many of the courses out there make learning Python more difficult than it has to be. To illustrate my point, I’ll give you a personal example.

When I first started learning Python, I wanted to do the things that excited me, like making websites. Unfortunately, the course I was taking forced me to spend multiple months on syntax. It was agony.

Throughout the course, Python code continued to look foreign and confusing. It was like an alien language. It’s no surprise I quickly lost interest.

Regrettably, most Python tutorials are very similar to this. They assume you need to learn all of Python syntax before you can start doing anything interesting. Is it any wonder most people give up?

Instead of wasting time on these mundane tasks, you could be experiencing the real thrills of Python. Think analyzing data, building a website, or creating an autonomous drone with artificial intelligence!

Items.Title: 一些 React Native 错误解决方案 | Some React Native Errors Solutions
Items.Description:
亚辛查阿

发表于 1 月 23 日

这些错误包括缺少依赖项、Android SDK 配置问题以及其他使 React Native 开发过程充满挑战的错误。

在本文中，我们介绍了一些类似的错误，这些错误可能出现在用于 React Native 开发的 Android 构建中，并提供了解决这些错误的解决方案。

错误 1 ： Cannot find symbol reactRootView.setIsFabric(BuildConfig.IS_NEW_ARCHITECTURE_ENABLED;

解决方案：

  • 将“IS_NEW_ARCHITECTURE_ENABLED”变量添加到 android> buildTypes > debug 和 android> buildTypes > release in app/build.gradle

备注：我们将此变量设置为 false 以禁用 react native 的新架构，如果你想使用它替换为 true。

解决方案：

  • 从 android/app 中删除构建文件夹

错误 3： INSTALL_FAILED_INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE

解决方案：

  • 打开 AndroidStudio 并转到 SDK Manager

关闭模拟器并擦除手机数据

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 yassinechraa 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Yassine Chraa

Posted on Jan 23

The React Native Android build encountered multiple errors, leading to a failed build. These errors included missing dependencies, issues with the Android SDK configuration, and other errors that made the React Native development process challenging.

In this article, we present some similar errors that can appear in the Android build for React Native development and provide solutions to resolve them.

Error1: Cannot find symbol reactRootView.setIsFabric(BuildConfig.IS_NEW_ARCHITECTURE_ENABLED;

Solution:

  • Add "IS_NEW_ARCHITECTURE_ENABLED" variable to android> buildTypes > debug and android> buildTypes > release in app/build.gradle

Remark: we set this variable as false to disable the new architecture of react native if you want to use it replace with true.

Error2: Requested internal only, but not enough space;

Solution:

  • Remove build folder from android/app

Error3: INSTALL_FAILED_INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE

Solution:

  • Open AndroidStudio and go to SDK Manager

Close your emulator and Wipe phone data

Items.Title: AWS 放大 | AWS Amplify
Items.Description:
这些可以一起使用或单独使用。 就像有人只想为他们的应用程序提供托管服务一样，他们只能使用 Amplify 托管服务。

您可以使用 Amplify 做的事情：

  • 启用数据存储。
  • 启用身份验证
  • 档案储存
  • 托管一个应用程序
  • 将 AI 或 ML 添加到您的应用程序。

它是一个用于快速构建全栈 Web 和移动应用程序的可视化开发环境。

  • 您可以使用以下方法快速构建应用程序的前端和后端：
  • 最少的编码（仍然需要做一些编码，但非常少）

    • 一旦暂停，komalm 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，komalm 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，komallm 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 komalm 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 komalm 的方法：

    降低 komallm 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    取消标记 komallm 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    AWS Amplify is an AWS service that lets you build, ship and host a full stack application on AWS. Amplify is a complete solution for frontend and mobile developers to easily build, ship and host.
    AWS amplify consists of tools like open source framework and visual development env and a fully managed web hosting service. These can be used together or individually. Like if some one just want a hosting service for their app they can only use Amplify host service.

    AWS Amplify: A set of tools that enables dev to build web and mobile apps leveraging various AWS services including front end and back end.
    Things you can do with Amplify:

    • Enable data storage.
    • Enable authentication
    • File Storage
    • Host an app
    • Add AI or ML to your application.

    Amplify CLI: Amplify has a CLI ready to use,

    • CLI:- Command Line Interface
    • CLI helps to configure app backend using the command line(terminal), like : amplify add auth - meaning aading auth to the application

    Amplify Studio: It brings the UI element to Amplify.

    • It is a visual development environment for building full-stack web and mobile apps fast.
    • You can build the front and backend of your app quickly with:
    • Minimal coding ( still need to do some coding but very less)

    Once suspended, komallm will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, komallm will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by komallm will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If komallm is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag komallm:

    Make all posts by komallm less visible

    komallm consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging komallm will restore default visibility to their posts.
